headlines: 73% heeft er meer dan één. Jij ook?
Elke steen een verhaal. Start de jouwe.
Love at first sight. Dan de tweede.
bodies:

images.description: The image shows a dark-beaded stretch bracelet with a single small square charm engraved with a logo, displayed inside a red frame-style box against a gray card printed with the text "IN CASE OF LOVE AT FIRST SIGHT" and "BREAK GLASS." The background consists of draped red satin fabric, and the overall lighting is dim with the product centrally lit. Visible text at the top reads "STONEY bracelets" followed by Dutch-language copy "20.000 mannen droegen er één. Toen kochten ze de tweede." At the bottom, a button reads "SHOP NU - 1 JAAR GARANTIE + LEVENSLANGE REPARATIE," and a Trustpilot-style rating shows "4.8 out of 5 stars" with five stars and "1,500+ reviews."

The image shows a dark beaded bracelet displayed inside a red rectangular frame/box, positioned on a red satin fabric background. The frame contains printed text reading "IN CASE OF LOVE AT FIRST SIGHT / FIRST SIGHT" and "BREAK GLASS," with the bracelet consisting of uniform dark spherical beads and a small square charm with a logo. Visible text on the image includes "STONEY bracelets" at the top, the Dutch phrases "20.000 mannen droegen er één." and "Toen kochten ze de tweede." in white typography, and at the bottom a black bar displaying five stars with "Rated 4.8 / 5" alongside a white button reading "Shop Stoney Bracelets" with a shopping cart icon.
